tagline: When you look for a swimming pool cleaning and maintenance company, you want the best.

hero.headline:
34 Years Keeping Pools Pristine
in Fairfield County
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your escape, not your weekend chore. Since 1992, the Saunders family and our certified technicians with 166+ years of combined experience have kept Fairfield and Westchester County pools clean, safe, and swim-ready. You relax, we handle the rest.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Inground Concrete & Gunite<br class="hidden md:block"> Pool Specialists
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to full renovations, our NSPF-certified team handles every aspect of your pool so you can spend your time swimming, not scrubbing.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and filter maintenance by certified technicians. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Pool Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, plumbing leaks, and structural issues. Most problems fixed quickly by our experienced team.

cards.title: Pool Renovation & Restoration
cards.description: Complete renovation for aging concrete and gunite pools, including resurfacing, tile replacement, coping repair, and structural upgrades.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of filters, pumps, heaters, and sanitization systems from top manufacturers to keep your pool running at peak efficiency.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal services to prepare your pool for summer fun and protect it through harsh Connecticut and New York winters. Done right, every time.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing and water testing to keep your pool safe, clear, and gentle on skin. No red eyes, no irritation, just pure enjoyment.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool. Jeff and the team will provide an honest, no-pressure assessment and quote. We treat every pool like it is our own.

steps.title: We Send Our Certified Team
steps.description: Our NSPF-certified technicians arrive on schedule with 166+ years of combined experience. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment, repairs, all handled professionally.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool Worry-Free
steps.description: Your pool stays pristine, safe, and swim-ready all season. If the issue is important to you, it is important to us. That is our promise since 1992.

about.label: Why Fairfield & Westchester Trust Us
about.headline: A Family Business Built on 34 Years of Trust
about.description: Founded by Jeff Saunders in 1992, Putnam Swimming Pool Service is a family-owned business that has served Fairfield County and Westchester County for over three decades. Our team of experienced, NSPF-certified technicians brings more than 166 years of combined expertise to every job. We specialize in inground concrete and gunite pools, and we hold licenses in both Connecticut and New York. Our philosophy is simple: if the issue is important to you, it is important to us.

features.title: Licensed & Fully Insured
features.description: Holding CT and NY contractor licenses, plumbing licenses, and pool builder licenses. Full liability coverage for your peace of mind.

features.title: 166+ Years Combined Experience
features.description: Our certified technicians bring decades of hands-on pool expertise. Every team member is trained, vetted, and passionate about pool care.

features.title: Your Satisfaction, Our Priority
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and make it right. Our mission since 1992 has been simple: your priorities are our priorities.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Flexible scheduling, honest quotes, and the quality you deserve from a family-owned company.

guarantee.headline: Our "Family Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right at no additional charge. Jeff Saunders built this company on trust, and after 34 years, that commitment has not changed. Your pool, your family, and your satisfaction matter to us.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in Fairfield and Westchester County are scheduled within a few days. For urgent pool issues, call us directly at 203-348-0512 and we will work to accommodate your needs as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: Do you only service inground concrete pools?
faqs.answer: We specialize in inground concrete and gunite swimming pools, which is where our 166+ years of combined experience truly shines. Contact us to discuss your specific pool type and we will let you know how we can help.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our team is NSPF-certified, and we hold Connecticut Home Improvement, Plumbing, and Pool Builder licenses as well as Westchester County Home Improvement licenses. We carry full liability insurance for every job.

faqs.question: Do you service pools in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are fully licensed in both Connecticut and New York, serving Lower Fairfield County CT and Westchester County NY including Greenwich, Stamford, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: What sets Putnam apart from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We are a family-owned business with 34 years of hands-on experience and a team with 166+ years of combined expertise. Our BBB A+ rating, multiple state licenses, and NSPF certifications back up our commitment to quality. If the issue is important to you, it is important to us.

testimonials.name: Henry
testimonials.text: Just a word of thanks to Putnam Swimming Pool Service for a really good summer swimming season. Your team kept our pool in perfect condition all year. Truly professional and reliable service.

testimonials.name: Bill
testimonials.text: You guys did a nice job closing up our pool. Thank you for the professional and thorough service. We will definitely be calling you back in the spring for our opening.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: The Putnam team helped us open the pool at our new home that needed draining, power washing, and some repairs. Very responsive, knowledgeable, and great to work with.

Ready for a Pool That
Takes Care of Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from our family-owned team. 34 years of trusted service in Fairfield and Westchester County. Call or fill out the form below.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
